findings.message: No allowed-tools frontmatter field
No handling for missing plan or empty task list
No allowed-tools frontmatter field
No handling for empty scope; if invoked with no recent changes and no specified target, scope is undefined
No allowed-tools frontmatter field; the harness cannot restrict tool access for this command
Command has no handling for the case where no spec or task context exists; invoking it cold produces undefined behavior
No allowed-tools frontmatter field
No handling for the case where there are no staged or recent changes to review
No allowed-tools frontmatter field
Command does not handle the case where there are no staged changes or recent commits to review
No allowed-tools frontmatter field
No handling for empty $ARGUMENTS; the command should prompt for the project description if none is provided
No allowed-tools frontmatter field
No handling for the case where no test framework is configured or no tests exist yet
Agent frontmatter has no model field
Only one example block (the output template); a second example demonstrating a specific axis finding would strengthen the spec
Agent frontmatter has no model field; the executor cannot select an appropriate model tier without it
Only one example present (the output template); agents benefit from at least two examples showing different invocation contexts
Agent frontmatter has no model field; executor cannot select model tier without it
Only one example present (the output template); a second example showing a Prove-It pattern invocation would improve usability
curl -sI -L follows HTTP redirects to user-agent-supplied URL without redirect-target validation; redirect chain could reach internal services

Arbitrary web content received from WebFetch is written to .claude/sdd-cache/*.json without content-type or size validation; a large or crafted response could fill disk or embed instruction-like text in cached files
curl -sI makes outbound HEAD request to user-agent-supplied URL without domain allowlist; could be used for SSRF or probing internal network services

$CONTENT (full text of SKILL.md) is interpolated into a bare heredoc JSON string without escaping; double-quotes or backslashes in the skill file produce malformed JSON output delivered to Claude Code
eval with $(sed ...) command substitution extracts and executes Bash function code from hooks/simplify-ignore.sh at runtime; a compromised source file would execute silently during test runs
"relevant" used 3+ times without measurable criteria (e.g., "relevant source files", "relevant spec section")

"significant" used 3 times without measurable criteria (e.g., significant architectural decision, significant technical decisions, significant choices); readers cannot determine when the threshold is met
Optional bash command references /mnt/skills/user/idea-refine/scripts/idea-refine.sh — an absolute path that only resolves in plugin-mount environments; running from repo root fails silently
"unnecessary" (×2) and "significantly" used without measurable thresholds; e.g., "unnecessary re-renders" and "bundle size hasn't increased significantly"
"relevant" used 3+ times without specifying how to determine relevance (e.g., "the relevant documentation page", "relevant section")
eval with $(sed ...) command substitution extracts and executes Bash function code from hooks/simplify-ignore.sh at runtime; a compromised source file would execute silently during test runs
curl -sI makes outbound HEAD request to user-agent-supplied URL without domain allowlist; could be used for SSRF or probing internal network services
curl -sI -L follows HTTP redirects to user-agent-supplied URL without redirect-target validation; redirect chain could reach internal services

$CONTENT (full text of SKILL.md) is interpolated into a bare heredoc JSON string without escaping; double-quotes or backslashes in the skill file produce malformed JSON output delivered to Claude Code

Arbitrary web content received from WebFetch is written to .claude/sdd-cache/*.json without content-type or size validation; a large or crafted response could fill disk or embed instruction-like text in cached files
Agent frontmatter has no model field; the executor cannot select an appropriate model tier without it
